content.en:
After killing this reincarnation source clan, Ye Tian had to deal with this reincarnation Xuanlin tree.

He was too lazy to snatch the reincarnation Xuanlin tree again and again, and chose to directly subdue this reincarnation Xuanlin tree.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian attacked this reincarnation Xuanlin tree, and hit it hard with a single blow.

This reincarnation Xuanlin tree is also very knowledgeable, and directly gave all the reincarnation Xuanlin fruits on his body to Ye Tian.

"Yes, it's still very good to be strong, with my strength, I'm almost sideways here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian found one special reincarnation tree after another, took away a lot of special fruits, and also obtained some other resources.

However, he still hasn't found the supreme fruit of reincarnation.

The highest value in the reincarnation fruit world is the supreme fruit of reincarnation, if you can't find the supreme fruit of reincarnation, it will be a pity!

But soon, he had news of the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation.

"There are members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who have found the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, a member of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan sent a message to him, informing him of the location of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

"I don't need to look for it myself, others have found it, I'll just go over!"

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly went to the location of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

Somewhere in the realm of reincarnation.

A group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords have surrounded this place, and all kinds of secret treasures that block the void have sealed this place, and they can only enter but not exit, which is also to prevent the reincarnation ancestral tree from escaping.

The wisdom of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree is no less than that of normal beings, and its strength is strong, and it is not comparable to the five-time Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and its normal combat power is comparable to the top six-time awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and the life-saving ability is terrifying, even if it is a seventh-time Origin Upper Realm Overlord, it is difficult to kill the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

Such a reincarnation ancestral tree, naturally we have to guard against it leaving.

Of course.

They didn't dare to attack immediately, and they had to wait for other Origin Upper Realm Overlords to come and gather a certain number before they dared to make a move against the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

"Twenty-two reincarnation supreme fruits, this time there are a lot of them!"

Swallowing Xi on the side of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan muttered.

"Everyone, we must not only be wary of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, but also those Reincarnation Origin Clans!"

It was the leader of the reincarnation Celestial Clan side who spoke - Rin Mo!

Rin Mo is the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Fifth Awakening, but his combat power is no less than that of the weaker Sixth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and his life-saving ability is also very strong, and his father is an Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Eight Awakenings.

Therefore, Rin Mo is qualified to lead the team, and other members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan also listen to Rin Mo's orders and arrangements.

Among the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, there was a young man with a long sword in his hand, his body exuded an extreme cyan light, and his aura was also much stronger than other Origin Upper Realm Overlords who broke the boundary of the five origins.

From the point of view of cultivation, he is still the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has broken the boundary of the five origins, but his combat power is definitely terrifying.

He is the leader of the reincarnation source clan, and he is also the most bechanting genius of this reincarnation source clan - Jiuyuan!

Jiuyuan has practiced the reincarnation supreme divine power of the reincarnation source clan, the reincarnation source clan is a little special, although they cannot awaken the reincarnation supreme divine power from the bloodline, but their origin can carry the reincarnation supreme divine power of their predecessors, but the success rate is very low, a chance of 1 in 100 million.

But once it is carried down, it can be used to cast the supreme power of reincarnation, but it can't exert too much power, but it is also more powerful than a genius who does not have the supreme power of reincarnation!

Most of the Origin Upper Realm overlords of the Reincarnation Origin Clan who have broken the boundaries of the nine origins have created the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation, and they can find suitable clansmen to instill the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation, and an era may give birth to several geniuses who inherit the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation.

And the reincarnation celestial clan is different, a total of only a few geniuses with reincarnation supreme supernatural powers have been awakened, this is the gap.

"Lord Jiuyuan, when will you do it?"

A member of the Reincarnation Source asked.

"Wait!"

Jiuyuan is not in a hurry.

His strength is very strong, even if it is Rinmo, he doesn't pay attention to it.

With his strength, even if he single-handedly reincarnated the ancestral tree, he can do it, but he can't defeat the other party.

And there are too many branches of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, if he protects those Reincarnation Supreme Fruits, he can't snatch them.

Therefore, he must ensure success and can only wait for more members of the Reincarnation Source Clan to arrive.

"Twenty-two reincarnation supreme fruits, I have to compete for twenty this time, and I have to kill some members of the reincarnation heavenly clan!"

That's what he's aiming for.

After a while, there were already quite a few members of the Reincarnation Source Clan.

The same is true on the side of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

And at this time, Ye Tian naturally came.

"So many members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan are here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His gaze looked directly at the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, and he also saw the twenty-two Reincarnation Supreme Fruits on the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, which was a good thing!

If he snatches these reincarnation supreme fruits, he will most likely awaken the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, and he can also raise his cultivation to the fourth balance realm.

At that time, the combat power of his Ao Chen's copy body was very terrifying, although he would definitely not be able to defeat the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened nine times, but relying on the Reincarnation Supreme Treasure and the two reincarnation supreme divine powers, he was absolutely invincible among the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"Hands-on !!!"

Jiuyuan and Rin Mo shouted separately.

Rumble!!!!

This group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords have killed the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, and the most important thing is to snatch the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation at present.

And Ye Tian naturally passed, he didn't show all his strength, but he also showed some strength, ignoring Rin Mo's orders, and killed through it alone.

"Aochen, don't be reckless!"

Rin Mo received an order from the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan to protect Aochen, but Aochen was so reckless.

However, the next moment he was shocked.

Directly Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body shattered the branches of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree with one blow, dodged the repeated attacks of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, and approached a Reincarnation Supreme Fruit.

Then.

The Reincarnation Ancestral Tree conjured up countless branches running through, and the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree didn't want to lose a Reincarnation Supreme Fruit.

If the supreme fruit of reincarnation is lost, it will inevitably cause some of the energy in your body to disappear.

However, every time, he couldn't bear it, and he was robbed of the supreme fruit of reincarnation by this group of outsiders.

Therefore, he hated this group of outsiders extremely much, and naturally went all out to resist and even kill these outsiders.

But at this moment.

Ye Tian took out the Reincarnation Supreme Treasure Spear, shattered the dense branches with one shot, grabbed the first Reincarnation Supreme Fruit with one hand, and took it away.
